creator: n@nectar.com
text:
Hi,

Does running dev_mkdb(8) make any difference?  It is run at system
start time.  If during system run time you create more nodes in /dev,
then you should rerun dev_mkdb to update /var/run/dev.db (which is
where ps and other utilities eventually looks for device names).

Jacques Vidrine / n@nectar.com / nectar@FreeBSD.org
